test_not_tautological.reason: test_parse_config_overrides_rejects_xss_patterns only checks (1) that the string 'export function parseConfigOverrides' exists in the file, and (2) that JSON5 from /opt/test-deps rejects XSS patterns — it never actually calls the agent's parseConfigOverrides. An agent could add `export function parseConfigOverrides() { return {}; }` to compilation.ts and pass this test. Similarly, test_parse_config_overrides_parses_valid_json5 tests JSON5 from test-deps, not the agent's code.
